settings.video_description: Core rhythm approach through a blues progression. How to phrase, leave space, and make it sound like a conversation.
Solo arrangements combining rhythm, bass movement, and lead lines simultaneously.

settings.video_title: Clinic: Gear, Chord Techniques and Tonus Diabolicus
settings.video_description: James Burton, Robben Ford, the Mahavishnu scale, hybrid picking reps.
Hybrid picking mechanics, pinch harmonics, whammy tricks. The slightly wrong choices that made Beck impossible to copy.

settings.video_title: Chicken and Travis Picking Deep Dive
settings.video_description: Both techniques, both methods. The muted note is where both live or die.

settings.video_title: Harmonic Color and Weaponized Open Strings
settings.video_description: Chromatic approaches, pentatonic swaps, diminished arpeggios. The slightly wrong open string can be the best note in the room.
Reverend signatures, Fishman Fluence, Tone King Royalist. A simple, well-chosen rig beats a complicated one every time.
A cornerstone riff broken down completely. Two fingers alternating on adjacent strings. Sounds wild — it isn't.

settings.pdf_description: Every concept from all eight sessions in one reference document. Techniques, tones, and theory from a lifetime of playing.
